title: The Ominous Umbrella
cover_description: Shadow clings to a chandelier while an open umbrella drags them sideways like a misbehaving kite.
host_intro: Tonight, Shadow warns you about a common household menace. It is not what you think.
host_outro: The umbrella has won. Shadow is still hiding under the table.
script:
[TITLE: The Ominous Umbrella]
[HOST_INTRO: Tonight, Shadow warns you about a common household menace. It is not what you think.]
[HOST_OUTRO: The umbrella has won. Shadow is still hiding under the table.]
[AGE: 9-12]
[VOICES: mysterious_witch]
[COMEDY_TYPE: misunderstanding]

[SETUP]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: ominous, tentative] Behold... the innocent-looking object dangling from the coat hook. [STING: witch_ominous]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: confident, building] It waits. It watches. It knows when the sky will darken. [STING: buildup_long]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: triumphant] And then... it strikes. [STING: villain_dramatic]

[BEAT_1]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: suspicious] I saw it first—curled like a sleeping serpent. [STING: tiptoe]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: caught off guard] It leapt open without warning! A black canopy unfurled above my head! [STING: big_crash]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: defensive] I did not scream. The umbrella screamed for me. [STING: mouse_panic]

[BEAT_2]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: scrambling] I tried to close it. The mechanism fought back! [STING: boing]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: desperate] It twisted in my grip—now it’s upside down, catching every raindrop like a greedy goblet! [STING: medium_hit]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: stunned] The water is rising. The umbrella is a boat. I am the captain of nothing. [STING: slide_whistle]

[BEAT_3]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: quiet, devastating] The wind has turned. The umbrella is dragging me toward the open window. [STING: whoosh]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: loud, panicked] I am airborne! I am a kite! I am— [STING: big_crash]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: deadpan] —now dangling from the chandelier by the handle. [STING: silence]

[BUTTON]
[SHADOW] [DELIVERY: desperate, loud] [PUNCHLINE]The umbrella has won. I surrender. Take me to your leader... the coat hook.[/PUNCHLINE] [STING: deflation]

[COVER: Shadow clings to a chandelier while an open umbrella drags them sideways like a misbehaving kite.]
[PREMISE: Umbrella comes to life]
